query:
_index=sumologic_volume 
| parse regex "(?<data>\{[^\{]+\})" multi
| json field=data "field","dataTier","sizeInBytes","count" as index, dataTier, bytes, count
| where _sourceCategory="view_and_tier_volume" and dataTier="Flex"
| where index not in ("sumologic_volume", "sumologic_audit")
| bytes/1024/1024/1024 as gbytes
| sum(gbytes) as gbytes by index
| top 5 index by gbytes

sources.dashboardDescription: The Logs dashboard helps you see your log ingest volume between default and non-default indexes along with the predicted growth. This dashboard also provides predicted growth for scan volume.
